overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a solitary walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district at night. The player character moves from beneath a concrete overpass, gazes up at towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and continues through deserted streets toward an intersection.

events.description: exits the sheltered area under the concrete overpass into the open rainy street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement beneath the overpass, emerging into the open rain

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating a covered walkway
modern glass facade building with illuminated windows running along the right side
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light on the wet pavement
short black and yellow traffic bollards lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass with a modern glass office building on the right. The street is wet and illuminated by warm street lamps. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from the sheltered area into the open rain, revealing the rainy night sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with towering skyscrapers and holographic ads

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and large holographic billboards against the rainy sky
camera rotates to pan across the surrounding high-rise buildings and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive skyscrapers and rotating to view the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' illuminated against the dark building
large vertical holographic advertisement on the left skyscraper showing a figure
tall digital billboard on the right building displaying white imagery

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements glowing against the dark rainy sky. The view rotates to show the dense urban canyon, with the Pacific Blvd sign visible and heavy rain falling between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street lined with digital billboards

events.description: passing a purple neon sign reading 'body lotto' on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet multi-lane street passing large digital billboards and neon signs on both sides

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen on the left building showing advertisements
multi-level concrete parking garage with horizontal slats on the right side
purple neon sign with 'body lotto' text glowing on the right building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide multi-lane street with a parking garage structure on the right and massive digital billboards on the left. The area is illuminated by various neon signs including a distinctive purple 'body lotto' sign, with heavy rain creating reflections on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic signals and palm trees

events.description: approaching the Catalina street intersection with red traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection, approaching the traffic lights and street sign while moving along the sidewalk

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Catalina' suspended over the intersection on a black pole
traffic signal showing red lights mounted on the intersection pole
tall palm tree visible on the left side of the street near the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street intersection marked by a 'Catalina' sign and red traffic lights. Palm trees line the left side of the sidewalk, and the parking garage recedes into the mid-ground as the camera moves toward the crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shelter of a concrete overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a rainy urban district. It begins beneath a massive concrete structure beside a glass office building, moving forward until it emerges from the shadows into the open rain and a dark night sky. As the camera tilts upward, the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers and glowing holographic advertisements that define a dense urban canyon, including a visible Pacific Blvd sign. The perspective then shifts back to the street, gliding past a parking garage and vibrant digital billboards, such as a purple body lotto sign, while heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on the asphalt. Finally, the camera approaches a street intersection marked by red traffic lights and a Catalina sign, passing palm trees as the surrounding architecture recedes into the distance.
